title: New Team Collaboration Features
description: Introducing team workspaces, real-time collaboration, and enhanced sharing capabilities.

body.raw:
We're thrilled to introduce powerful new collaboration features that make working with your team more efficient than ever.

## New Features

### 👥 Team Workspaces
- Create dedicated workspaces for different teams and projects
- Granular permission controls for workspace access
- Centralized team resource management

### 🔄 Real-time Collaboration
- Live cursor tracking when multiple users edit simultaneously
- Real-time comments and suggestions
- Instant notifications for team activity

### 📤 Enhanced Sharing
- Share resources with expiring links
- Embed interactive components in external sites
- Export data in multiple formats (CSV, JSON, PDF)

### 🎨 UI/UX Improvements
- Redesigned navigation with improved accessibility
- Dark mode support across all components
- Mobile-responsive design improvements

## Performance Updates
- 30% reduction in initial page load time
- Improved caching strategies
- Optimized image loading and compression

## Developer Experience
- New webhook endpoints for team events
- Enhanced API documentation with interactive examples
- SDKs updated for major programming languages
